Room.title: Room
Room.description: A typing competition room created by a teacher.

teacherId.description: The UID of the teacher who created the room.

status.description: The current status of the game.

words.description: The list of words to type.

currentWordIndex.description: The index of the word currently being typed.

wordStartTime.description: The timestamp when the current word started.

durationPerWord.description: The time limit for each word in seconds.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the room was created.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: A student participating in a typing competition.

name.description: The display name of the participant.

roomId.description: The ID of the room they are in.

scores.description: A map of word indices to scores.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp of the last update.
